provenance.source_corpus: Decadal soil and stand response to fire, harvest, and salvage-logging disturbances in the western boreal mixedwood forest of Alberta, Canada

source_spans.text: postfire salvage logging
clearcut harvesting
Forest floor total C content was initially highest in the control and lowest in the salvage-logging treatment
Forest floor CEC decreased under salvage logging over the 10-year period considered here
Forest floor depth was consistently lower under salvage logging relative to other treatments
the long-term decrease in extractable S under salvage logging
The profound reduction in soil C pools under severe fire and salvage logging
harvesting alone resulted in long-term increases in available soil N
Effects on soil and foliar nutrition were not reflected in productivity (height and diameter) of regenerating vegetation
greater concentrations of foliar N in the harvesting treatment
at the 10 or 11 year measurement, it was highest among all treatments
Forest floor extractable NH4-N concentration was initially lowest in the control and salvage-logged treatments
Forest floor extractable NO3-N... increased at 10 or 11 years
Salvage logging also resulted in a recovery trajectory that was different from either the fire or harvesting disturbances

edges.original_sentence: Forest floor total C content was initially highest in the control and lowest in the salvage-logging treatment, with C content under salvage logging not changing significantly over time.

edges.original_sentence: Forest floor depth was consistently lower under salvage logging relative to other treatments at both points in time.

edges.subject: causal_mosaic:node:9fcac2aa99c7
edges.original_sentence: However, the long-term decrease in extractable S under salvage logging could be related to persistent organic matter loss.

source_document.title: Decadal soil and stand response to fire, harvest, and salvage-logging disturbances in the western boreal mixedwood forest of Alberta, Canada

edges.subject: causal_mosaic:node:9fcac2aa99c7
edges.original_sentence: The profound reduction in soil C pools under severe fire and salvage logging, with a lower rate of recovery under salvage logging, has demonstrated differences in the effects of single and multiple disturbances on soil organic matter at these sites.

source_spans.text: The profound reduction in soil C pools under severe fire and salvage logging, with a lower rate of recovery under salvage logging, has demonstrated differences in the effects of single and multiple disturbances on soil organic matter at these sites.

source_document.title: Decadal soil and stand response to fire, harvest, and salvage-logging disturbances in the western boreal mixedwood forest of Alberta, Canada

edges.subject: causal_mosaic:node:9fcac2aa99c7
edges.original_sentence: Salvage logging also resulted in a recovery trajectory that was different from either the fire or harvesting disturbances.

edges.subject: causal_mosaic:node:9fcac2aa99c7
edges.original_sentence: Extractable P concentration did not change through time under salvage logging, and at the 10 or 11 year measurement, it was highest among all treatments.

edges.subject: causal_mosaic:node:9fcac2aa99c7
edges.original_sentence: Forest floor extractable NH4-N concentration was initially lowest in the control and salvage-logged treatments and highest in the burned and harvested treatments.

source_document.title: Decadal soil and stand response to fire, harvest, and salvage-logging disturbances in the western boreal mixedwood forest of Alberta, Canada

edges.subject: causal_mosaic:node:9fcac2aa99c7
edges.original_sentence: Forest floor extractable NO3-N was initially similar among treatments; it increased at 10 or 11 years, with concentration under harvesting increasing significantly more than for the other treatments.
